member.title: Member
member.description: This credential attests that you are a member of the issuer organisation

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: This credential attests that you are owner of Liccium app account with corresponding did:key

student.title: Student
student.description: This credential attests that you are a student of the issuer organisation

external_keypair.title: External DID:key Credential
external_keypair.description: This credential is tied to your own cryptographic keypair. You must complete a keypair challenge before it can be issued.
external_keypair.requirements: Requires external EC P-256 keypair verification

cert_signed.title: X.509 Cert-Signed Credential
cert_signed.description: This credential is signed with the issuer's own X.509 certificate instead of the platform certificate.
cert_signed.requirements: Requires issuer to have a verified external X.509 certificate
